positive: A detailed, vector-style illustration of a cosmic, bioluminescent sloth hanging from a vine. The sloth has expressive, friendly eyes and is surrounded by stylized elements of flora and celestial bodies—such as crescent moons, tiny glowing nebula swirls, and abstract geometric patterns that mimic constellations. The scene must have a strong, dramatic silhouette against a deep indigo and teal cosmic background. Use highly contrasting colors: neon magenta, electric cyan, and lime green accents against the dark background. The composition should be centrally balanced, perfect for a T-shirt print. Style: Modern geometric kawaii art meets detailed scientific illustration. Lighting: High contrast, dramatic rim lighting, ethereal glowing effects. Highly detailed, crisp lines, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, low resolution, text, watermarks, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, muted, monochrome, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters
